# Tokovo

> AI-native studio for multi-device shows that happen inside phones.

Tokovo is a deterministic TypeScript monorepo for authoring, previewing, and rendering phone-native episodes. It gives AI agents and creators a structured production stage with one or many simulated devices, app worlds, OS surfaces, camera direction, sound, voice, backgrounds, overlays, and vertical MP4 rendering.

## Links

- Website: https://www.tokovo.io
- Repository: https://github.com/nishit-g/tokovo
- README: https://github.com/nishit-g/tokovo#readme
- License: https://github.com/nishit-g/tokovo/blob/master/LICENSE
- Contributing: https://github.com/nishit-g/tokovo/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md
- Security: https://github.com/nishit-g/tokovo/blob/master/SECURITY.md

## Core Documentation

- Architecture: https://github.com/nishit-g/tokovo/blob/master/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- V1 stability bar: https://github.com/nishit-g/tokovo/blob/master/docs/V1_STABILITY.md
- Camera reference: https://github.com/nishit-g/tokovo/blob/master/docs/CAMERA_V1_REFERENCE.md
- Public release checklist: https://github.com/nishit-g/tokovo/blob/master/docs/operations/public-release.md
- Release operations: https://github.com/nishit-g/tokovo/blob/master/docs/operations/release.md
- Asset licenses: https://github.com/nishit-g/tokovo/blob/master/ASSET_LICENSES.md

## Important Source Areas

- `packages/episodes`: canonical episode definitions, curated catalogs, validation, runtime plugin manifest.
- `packages/dsl`: fluent builders for devices, app tracks, camera, audio, overlays, and device tracks.
- `packages/compiler`: lowering, preparation, compiler plugins, audio/camera directors.
- `packages/core`: deterministic runtime, world state, event replay, registries, logging contracts.
- `packages/renderer`: React render surface and camera-aware layout.
- `packages/apps-*`: app simulators for WhatsApp, iMessage, Instagram, X, LinkedIn, Snapchat, Teams, and Typewriter.
- `packages/device-*` and `packages/devices`: device profiles, OS chrome, camera, keyboard, notifications.
- `apps/video-runner`: Remotion preview and MP4 render surface.
- `apps/render-service`: render-service CLI and orchestration primitives.
- `apps/docs`: public docs site.
- `apps/web`: marketing site.

## Agent Notes

- Canonical agent instructions live in `AGENTS.md`.
- Claude-specific entrypoint lives in `CLAUDE.md`.
- Reusable repo skill lives in `.skills/tokovo-authoring/SKILL.md`.
- Use Node.js 20 or newer and pnpm 10.28.2.
- The canonical release gate is `pnpm verify:release`.
- Generated renders and local outputs should not be committed unless they are intentional docs showcase assets.
